purpose: Plan compact 100 tasks 2026-06-25 — orquestra 9 squads (S0-S8), 1-2 agents max paralelo. Reescreve task-bank com status REAL pós-gates fix.
global_priority: S0 primeiro (Supabase 0 tables bloqueia 70% do sistema), depois A (resilience), depois B/D em paralelo

S01.title: Schema public completo: clientes, protocolos, atendimentos, documentos, emolumentos, audit_log, webhook_events, outbox_messages, lgpd_consents, lgpd_audit_anpd

S02.title: RLS policies: 4 roles (anon, authenticated, service_role, dpo) + testes de bloqueio

S03.title: pg_cron jobs: audit_verify diario 03:00, dlq_retry 5min, cache_warm 06:00, snapshot_diario 23:55

S04.title: Database webhooks: outbox_message INSERT -> N8N flow evolution, chatwoot, telegram

S05.title: GraphQL via PostgREST: introspection publica + endpoint /graphql/v1 com permissões

S08.title: Vault secrets: cartorio_api_key, audit_hmac_key, opencode_go_key, supabase_anon+service, chatwoot_token, evolution_key, n8n_basic_auth, telegram_bot_token, jules_api, render_api, linear_api

S09.title: Migrations Alembic setup: 1 migration inicial cria todas as tabelas, alembic.ini + env.py, script deploy
